name: NeoIPC HAP - validate definition
description: Validates whether the information entered for a pneumonia fulfills the criteria of the NeoIPC pneumonia definition
condition: !(#{NeoIPC HAP Imaging criterion fulfilled} && #{NeoIPC HAP Respiratory support criterion fulfilled} && #{NeoIPC HAP Clinical criteria fulfilled})

name: NeoIPC BSI LCBSI with common commensal detected only once and no antibiotic treatment validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog against the LCBSI definition in the protocol where a common commensal was detected only once and no antibiotic treatment was initiated.

name: NeoIPC BSI LCBSI with common commensal detected multiple times or with AB-treatment >= 5 days validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog against the LCBSI definition in the protocol where a common commensal was detected multiple times or where systemic antibiotic treatment for 5 days or more was initiated.
condition:
(
  !#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture}
  &&
  (
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 value})
    ||
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 value})
    ||
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 value})
  )
  &&
  (
    !#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 is recognized pathogen}
    &&
    !#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 is recognized pathogen}
    &&
    !#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 is recognized pathogen}
  )
)
&&
(
  (
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 recovered multiple times value}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 recovered multiple times value} == true))
    ||
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 recovered multiple times value}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 recovered multiple times value} == true))
    ||
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 recovered multiple times value}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 recovered multiple times value} == true))
    ||
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment} == true))
  )
  &&
  (
    #{NeoIPC BSI Common sepsis total findings count} < 2
  )
)

name: NeoIPC BSI Clinical sepsis validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog against the clinical sepsis definition in the protocol
condition:
(
  (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture} == true))
  &&
  (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 value}))
  &&
  (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 value}))
  &&
  (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 value}))
)
&&
(
  (#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment} == false)
  ||
  (#{NeoIPC BSI Common sepsis total findings count} < 2)
)

name: NeoIPC BSI Assign common laboratory findings count
description: Sets the variable for the common laboratory findings to 1 if any are set as present in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog.
condition:
(#{NeoIPC BSI White blood cell count count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI Platelet count count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI CRP count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI Procalcitonin count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI IT ratio count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI Interleukin count} > 0)

name: NeoIPC HAP Lower respiratory tract sample positive - infer true
description: Sets the program rule variable "NeoIPC HAP Lower respiratory tract sample positive" to true if any of the 3 detected pathogens was detected from the lower respiratory tract.
condition: (#{NeoIPC HAP Pathogen 1 source value} > 1) || (#{NeoIPC HAP Pathogen 2 source value} > 1) || (#{NeoIPC HAP Pathogen 3 source value} > 1)

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance days - validate
condition: (#{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 1 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 2 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 3 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 4 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 5 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 6 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 7 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 8 days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Antibiotic substance 9 days - current event value}) < #{NeoIPC Surveillance end AB days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end NIV + INV days - validate
condition: (#{NeoIPC Surveillance end NIV days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end INV days - current event value})> #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}
